requirement.statement: The system SHALL account token and elapsed-time usage for active goals across turn lifecycle events, SHALL update budget-related statuses when needed, and SHALL automatically continue an active goal through the runtime lifecycle hook mechanism when the session becomes idle and no higher-priority user input is pending.

case.given: an active goal and no active turn or pending higher-priority mailbox message
case.when: the organ runtime produces an `actor.idle.before` hook invocation
case.then: the goal continuation hook SHALL return a mailbox enqueue effect for the continuation prompt
the effect SHALL enqueue a `heartbeat` mailbox message for the owning actor/fiber

case.given: an active goal and pending human input or control mailbox message
case.when: the `actor.idle.before` goal hook evaluates goal continuation
case.then: the pending human input or control message SHALL retain priority over goal continuation

case.given: the runtime background watchdog ticks while a goal is active
case.when: the runtime needs to check for idle continuation
case.then: the watchdog MAY produce a lifecycle idle invocation
the watchdog SHALL NOT call goal continuation logic directly

requirement.given: an active goal and pending actor mailbox work in `control`, `toolResult`, `asyncCompletion`, `childDone`, `memberCoordination`, `humanInput`, `memberChatInbox`, or `heartbeat`
requirement.when: the `actor.idle.before` goal continuation hook evaluates continuation
requirement.then: existing mailbox work SHALL retain actor mailbox priority over goal heartbeat continuation
